data.content: Approved: Comprehensive tests added: poll_claim/tests_ext2.rs tests prompt_body_for_state distinguishing branch vs PR profiles across all 6 profiles for implementation, implementation_review, shipment, and shipment_review states. profile_tests.rs tests human-gated profile owners preserved. tests_registry_ext.rs tests compatibility workflow renders distinct prompt variants. loom_compat_bundle.rs tests all builtin prompts include output-specific delivery targets. skills.rs tests delivery-target-explicit wording. All assertions correctly validate AC6 requirements.
